calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-063 CRF availability-maintenance readiness: re-state gate on the ISOLATING statistic crf_frac_maintained (supersedes 666a)
items.note: ARC-063 crf-availability-maintenance substrate-readiness diagnostic (claim_ids=[], non_contributory -- does NOT weight governance). Supersedes V3-EXQ-666a; routed by confirmed failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-666a_2026-06-11 (measurement_test_design_defect, NOT substrate failure). RE-STATES the load-bearing readiness gate on the ISOLATING statistic crf_frac_maintained (maintained-reactivatable fraction = n_maintained/n_slots), NOT the gap-density-sensitive count floor crf_n_maintained_reactivatable>=2 that 666a used (and that differentiation-alone cleared). Same 3-arm matched stack ARM_0_OFF / ARM_1_MATURE_E2CTX / ARM_2_MATURE_E2CTX_MAINTENANCE on the SD-056-online e2 + lateral-PFC-head + crf_persist stack. Gate: ARM_2 crf_frac_maintained >= 0.625 clears AND ARM_1 < 0.5 fails (666a ARM_2 1.0/0.625/0.938 vs ARM_1 0.188/0.125/0.438). Adds a context-absent silence gap (CandidateRuleField.credit iterated 2000 ticks post-training) so differentiation-alone erodes below the floor while activity-silent maintenance (decay=0.0) HOLDS -- robust to gap density. Same-statistic non-vacuity discipline: minted>=2, full-pool differentiation (crf_max_pairwise_rule_dist>0.1 on e2ctx arms), AND the ARM_2 maintained pool the fraction gate counts is itself a >=2-rule differentiated pool (count + differentiation readiness on the positive control); any unmet -> substrate_not_ready_requeue, never a false verdict. ARM_2 maintenance-ON adopted as mature default. validate_experiments --strict OK (0 readiness-warnings, arm-fingerprint OK); dry-run end-to-end (self-routes substrate_not_ready at toy scale by design; dry artifact scrubbed). PASS -> /governance flips crf-availability-maintenance ready=true and unblocks the 654c GAP-B behavioural re-run (MECH-309/ARC-062), queued separately. MECH-309/ARC-062/ARC-063 stay candidate/substrate_ceiling/v3_pending/pending_retest_after_substrate.

items.title: MECH-229 wanting!=liking SD-057 OBJECT-BOUND retest: most-wanted z_goal pointer (MECH-346) != last-consumed type, on the 603n-validated scaffolded_sd054_onboarding curriculum; same-statistic WL non-vacuity readiness gate (the 514m vacuity fix)
items.note: Substrate-faithful MECH-229 retest routed by confirmed failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-514m_2026-06-11 (governance cycle #4 reclassified 514m C_WL=0.0/3-seeds VACUOUS -> non_contributory, measurement_test_design_defect: the legacy DV compared SD-014 residue VALENCE_WANTING/LIKING channels that 514m never wrote, so |w-l|>0.1 could never fire). This run measures the SD-057 OBJECT-BOUND wanting-target (MECH-346 most-wanted z_goal pointer = IncentiveTokenBank.most_wanted k* = argmax base_value*(1+kappa*per_axis_drive)) != liking-target (last-consumed type) dissociation -- the biologically+forward-faithful test the SD-049 verdict pre-registered, on the live SD-057 substrate (use_incentive_token_bank already on; landed 2026-06-04). Built through the FULL scaffolded_sd054_onboarding curriculum at the 603n config (Stage-0->0b->P0->Stage-H->P1->P2; ready=true 2026-06-11 per 603n PASS), identical to 514m, then a frozen-policy SD-049 Phase-2 eval binds the per-object token + seeds z_goal via the substrate's own update_z_goal(resource_type=...) at each consumption event and compares the most-wanted pointer to the consumed type. CONTACT GUARD retained (per-seed P2 contact_rate>0 AND z_goal_norm_at_contact_peak>0.4; <2/3 -> substrate_not_ready_requeue). NEW SAME-STATISTIC WL NON-VACUITY READINESS GATE (the exact gap the 514m contact guard lacked -- it checked foraging but not channel-write): leg1 positive-control cross-target separation (a constructed 2-token bank from this run's GoalConfig must yield a drive-favored most-wanted != designated last-consumed -- the SAME cross-target-inequality statistic C_WL routes on; instrument-can-fire) AND leg2 in-run bank populated >=2 distinct tokens at differing per-axis drives on >=2/3 guard-passing seeds (channels-written-this-run). Below floor -> substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory), NEVER a false MECH-229 weakens (V3-EXQ-643 lesson). PASS (supports MECH-229) = contact non-vacuity AND WL readiness AND C_WL (mean object-bound wanting!=liking dissoc fraction >= 0.3); readiness-met-but-C_WL-unmet -> a GENUINE weakens. claim_ids=[MECH-229] ONLY -- MECH-230 NOT re-tagged (its supports stands from 514m C_ID/C_ANOVA). SUCCESSOR (NOT supersede) of V3-EXQ-514m (514m is non_contributory, not invalid-by-bug in any arm this re-tests). validate_experiments --strict --paths OK (0 readiness-warnings); --dry-run end-to-end PASS (curriculum runs, bank populates 2 tokens via Stage-0 cue-bind goal_r 0.958, self-routes substrate_not_ready at 1-seed toy scale as designed -- contact_rate=0 at dry budget). Closes goal_pipeline:GAP-2 on PASS. Runner NOT started.

items.title: SD-033b/MECH-263 trained-OFC-head BEHAVIOURAL retest (485e successor): defeat OFC clamp-saturation (ofc_bias_scale 0.1->0.5) + enable SD-056 e2_action_contrastive in P0 for an action-divergent candidate bank + absolute between_context_tv floor on C2; closes commitment_closure:GAP-8
items.note: Successor (NOT supersede) to the non_contributory V3-EXQ-485e, routed by confirmed failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-485e_2026-06-11 (substrate_not_ready_requeue; trained-head bias cross-candidate RANGE cleared the floor on only 1/3 seeds so every behavioural DV was vacuously ~0). 2-arm frozen-vs-trainable OFC head (ofc_train_state_bias_head), OFC isolated (gated_policy/dACC/lateral_pfc/modulatory-bias-selection-authority OFF), ofc_harm_dim>0, SD-054 reef/forage env. P0 encoder warmup (NOW with SD-056 e2_action_contrastive in-batch-negatives InfoNCE on world_forward) -> P1 head REINFORCE -> P2 behavioural eval (devaluation TV shift + task-role separation). THREE autopsy fixes: (1) ofc_bias_scale 0.1->0.5 defeats the 485e clamp-saturation that railed |bias|~0.1 on seeds 1&2; (2) SD-056 e2_action_contrastive enabled in P0 (landed but NOT enabled in 485e) so the proposer bank world_states[1] carries action-divergent z_world range (485e bank collapsed per V3-EXQ-571/ARC-065 GAP-A/SD-056); (3) absolute between_context_tv floor (0.05) on C2 so the separation ratio cannot pass vacuously on a near-zero denominator (485e C2 was a 322-or-0 artefact). Frozen head (bias==0) = GAP-1-analogue silence control. KEEP the same-statistic non-vacuity readiness gate: trained-head bias cross-candidate RANGE > floor on >=2/3 seeds AND head weight-delta > floor -> below-floor self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory), NEVER a false weakens; readiness-met-but-DVs-fail -> honest weakens. evidence_direction_per_claim. validate_experiments --strict OK (0 readiness-warnings, arm-fingerprint OK); --dry-run PASS end-to-end (frozen silent, trainable trains+bias-range clears floor, self-routes substrate_not_ready at 1-seed toy scale as designed). Predecessors 485b/485c (representation-level PASS), 485d (substrate readiness), 485e (non_contributory).

items.title: ARC-065 GAP-A R1.b matched-entropy behavioural falsifier on the V3-EXQ-662-validated route-range substrate (supersedes 569f)
items.note: GAP-A behavioural retest successor to V3-EXQ-569f, routed by confirmed failure_autopsy_569f-661-654a_2026-06-10. Same 3-arm matched-entropy R1.a/R1.b decision rule; route-range substrate ON all arms (use_modulatory_channel_routing + source=cand_world_summary + authority gain 0.5, V3-EXQ-662-validated) so the e2_world_forward channel range reaches committed action (569f bit-identical-entropy washout). candidate_summary_source is the single swept variable. P0 route-range readiness gate (ARM_1 modulatory_channel_route_range > floor >=2/3 seeds) self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue below floor -> non_contributory, never a weakens. claim_ids=[ARC-065] only. NOTE: recovered from a phase3-queue snapshot rebase conflict (re-appended onto the re-materialised snapshot).

items.title: INV-074 crystallization-necessity: task-distribution-shift phase-3 redesign (supersedes 610f)
items.note: IGW-20260609-038 / failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610f_2026-06-08 user-confirmed route (a). Replaces the noise-only phase-3 with a genuine TASK-DISTRIBUTION SHIFT (SD-054 reef-bipartite layout + hazard_food_attraction=0.8 -> flee-to-reef single dominant optimum conflicting with the phase-0-2 forage policy) so the un-crystallized control suffers catastrophic forgetting (D2 collapse) while the EWC-anchored arm resists (D1). reef_enabled in all phases keeps world_obs_dim=275 constant. Decisive substrate-incapacity fork pre-registered: if D2 still fails on a genuine task-shift -> accept INV-074 substrate_ceiling and STOP the 610 cascade. 5 arms x 3 seeds (42/43/44) x 2500 ep x 200 steps; verified wiring (_assert_fixes_wired) + D3 non-vacuity gate carried from 610f.

items.title: MECH-025b precision-responsibility attribution: test whether high-precision actions accumulate proportionally more residue than low-precision actions
items.note: EXP-0150 dispatch: tests MECH-025b claim that precision level modulates responsibility attribution. Measures correlation between E3.current_precision and ResidueField accumulation during committed steps. Two key metrics: (1) Pearson r(precision, residue_delta) should be positive, (2) high-precision steps (above median) should accumulate proportionally more residue per harm than low-precision steps. PASS requires C1: precision_residue_correlation > 0.15, C2: high_precision_residue_ratio > 1.1, C3: committed_step_count >= 20, C4: world_forward_r2 > 0.05 (E2 functional), C5: harm_pred_std > 0.01 (E3 not collapsed), C6: no fatal errors. Smoke test clean (36 committed steps, no crashes).

items.title: MECH-057b trajectory-promotion-gate: test whether filtering incomplete hippocampal trajectories before E3 improves harm avoidance
items.note: EXP-0152 dispatch (IGW-20260611-204): first genuine experiment for MECH-057b (hippocampal sequence completion gate). Tests whether trajectory candidates from HippocampalModule should be filtered by completion quality (residue cost) before reaching E3. ARM_0_NO_GATE: baseline (all candidates reach E3, current V3 behavior). ARM_1_COMPLETION_GATE: test (filter high-residue trajectories, pass only best-scoring + minimum 2 candidates). PASS requires ALL: C1: harm_rate reduction >=10%, C2: completion_signal improvement >=5%, C3: gate filters >=15% of candidates, C4: E3 not deadlocked (>=2 candidates), C5: E3 functional (precision >=0.5), C6: baseline not collapsed (goal_success >=0.05), C7: no fatal errors. Smoke test clean (2 seeds x 2 arms x 2 train eps + 2 eval eps, no crashes). 3 seeds x 2 arms x 500 train eps + 100 eval eps x 200 steps.

items.title: MECH-171 vicious cycle: test whether early sleep phase disruption triggers cascading degradation through consolidation failure
items.note: EXP-0153 dispatch (IGW-20260611-203): first genuine experiment for MECH-171 (sleep disruption vicious cycle). Tests whether early sleep phase disruption triggers cascading degradation through consolidation failure -> attribution failure -> behavioral disorientation -> increased arousal -> further sleep disruption. Three-arm comparison: ARM_A_HEALTHY (baseline), ARM_B_EARLY (disruption at ep 50), ARM_C_LATE (disruption at ep 150). PASS requires (C1 AND C3 AND C5) OR (C2 AND C4): C1 slot diversity A>B+0.05, C2 B<C-0.03, C3 harm rate A<B+0.01, C4 B>C+0.005, C5 pred loss A<B+0.05. Smoke test clean (3 seeds x 3 arms x 18 train eps + 2 eval eps x 20 steps, no crashes). Full run: 3 seeds x 3 arms x 300 train eps + 30 eval eps x 150 steps.
